dict.string: Brain Unfog needs calendar access to sync scheduled tasks with the BUF-owned calendar.
Brain Unfog needs calendar write access to maintain BUF-owned schedule events.
Brain Unfog needs calendar access to sync scheduled tasks with the BUF-owned calendar.
Brain Unfog may need contacts access when macOS resolves calendar participant metadata.
Brain Unfog needs reminders access to sync Logseq project tasks with Apple Reminders.
Brain Unfog needs reminders access to sync Logseq project tasks with Apple Reminders.
